tagline: An English-medium, co-educational CBSE school in the heart of Kolkata
board: Affiliated to CBSE, New Delhi · Affiliation No. 1930XXXX

contact.address: 42 Lake Gardens Avenue, Salt Lake City, Kolkata – 700091

payments.note: Both links hand off to separate, already-deployed applications (a fee-payment portal and an admissions portal). This site only links out to them; it does not process payments or applications itself.

announcementBar: Admissions open for Academic Session 2027–28 · Prep-I to Class IX · Apply before 15 August 2026

hero.heading: Where every child finds their own kind of brilliance
hero.body: Sunrise Valley has spent four decades building confident, curious learners — grounding rigorous academics in kindness, discipline and the courage to ask questions.

quote.text: The training by which the current and expression of will are brought under control and become fruitful — that is education.
quote.author: Swami Vivekananda

principal.name: Mrs. Ananya Bhattacharya
principal.message: We measure this school not by the marks on a report card alone, but by the questions our students learn to ask, the kindness they carry into a room, and their readiness to meet a changing world with steady confidence. That is the promise every teacher here works toward, every single day.

programs.title: Pre-Primary
programs.description: Play-based learning that builds language, motor skills and social confidence through stories, music and guided discovery.

programs.title: Primary
programs.description: A strong foundation in literacy, numeracy and inquiry, with dedicated periods for art, music and physical education.

programs.title: Middle & Secondary
programs.description: CBSE curriculum delivered through activity-based, technology-supported classrooms, building toward the Class X board exam.

programs.title: Senior Secondary
programs.description: Science, Commerce and Humanities streams with focused mentoring for board examinations and competitive entrance tests.

infrastructure.title: Library
infrastructure.description: 22,000+ titles across two reading halls, open through the school day.

infrastructure.title: Science Laboratories
infrastructure.description: Dedicated Physics, Chemistry, Biology and Computer Science labs.

infrastructure.title: Sports & Games
infrastructure.description: Basketball and volleyball courts, athletics track and indoor games hall.

infrastructure.title: Art & Music Room
infrastructure.description: Space and instruments for visual art, classical and contemporary music.

infrastructure.title: Auditorium
infrastructure.description: 500-seat air-conditioned auditorium for assemblies and annual events.

infrastructure.title: Safe Transport
infrastructure.description: GPS-tracked bus fleet covering Salt Lake, New Town and Rajarhat routes.

notices.title: Regular classes suspended on 21.07.2026 for Primary and Secondary sections
